goal: Add a durable daemon-owned repo registry and refactor lifecycle plumbing so persistent repo registration is the source of truth while loaded runtimes remain an in-memory cache layered on top.

report_fields.MISSION ANCHOR: Fully implement the single-daemon lifecycle upgrade for pi-code-index so it uses a persistent repo registry, supports automatic idle shutdown, unloads disabled repo runtimes immediately, and exposes daemon-wide observability through doctor/status flows without introducing a new public command surface.
report_fields.Contract coverage: pass - `LIFECYCLE-REGISTRY-FOUNDATION` acceptance is met: durable user-cache registry added in `src/daemon/repo-registry.ts`, runtime hydration now reads persistent registry truth in `src/daemon/server.ts`, and restart persistence plus enabled-vs-loaded restoration are covered in `tests/index-storage.test.ts`.
report_fields.Correctness risk: pass - Registry ownership stays in the daemon, no new public command surface was introduced, and runtime-vs-registry separation is explicit via persistent `RepoRegistry` plus in-memory `runtimes` cache in `src/daemon/server.ts`.
report_fields.Verification evidence: pass - Canonical evidence reports `npm run check` and `npm test` passed, and tests specifically assert registry durability across restart plus restoration behavior for enabled and unseen repos in `tests/index-storage.test.ts`.
report_fields.Docs/state parity: pass - Review matches canonical `.agent/current/active-slice.json` contract, locked notes, implementation surfaces, and verification evidence; no contract drift found.

report_text:
MISSION ANCHOR: Fully implement the single-daemon lifecycle upgrade for pi-code-index so it uses a persistent repo registry, supports automatic idle shutdown, unloads disabled repo runtimes immediately, and exposes daemon-wide observability through doctor/status flows without introducing a new public command surface.
Remaining contract IDs: LIFECYCLE-UNLOAD-IDLE-GATING, LIFECYCLE-OBSERVABILITY
Rubric:
- Contract coverage: pass - `LIFECYCLE-REGISTRY-FOUNDATION` acceptance is met: durable user-cache registry added in `src/daemon/repo-registry.ts`, runtime hydration now reads persistent registry truth in `src/daemon/server.ts`, and restart persistence plus enabled-vs-loaded restoration are covered in `tests/index-storage.test.ts`.
- Correctness risk: pass - Registry ownership stays in the daemon, no new public command surface was introduced, and runtime-vs-registry separation is explicit via persistent `RepoRegistry` plus in-memory `runtimes` cache in `src/daemon/server.ts`.
- Verification evidence: pass - Canonical evidence reports `npm run check` and `npm test` passed, and tests specifically assert registry durability across restart plus restoration behavior for enabled and unseen repos in `tests/index-storage.test.ts`.
- Docs/state parity: pass - Review matches canonical `.agent/current/active-slice.json` contract, locked notes, implementation surfaces, and verification evidence; no contract drift found.
Findings: none.
Acceptable as-is: yes
Smallest follow-up slice: none; proceed to completion-auditor.

MISSION ANCHOR: Fully implement the single-daemon lifecycle upgrade for pi-code-index so it uses a persistent repo registry, supports automatic idle shutdown, unloads disabled repo runtimes immediately, and exposes daemon-wide observability through doctor/status flows without introducing a new public command surface.

Remaining contract IDs: LIFECYCLE-UNLOAD-IDLE-GATING, LIFECYCLE-OBSERVABILITY

Canonical re-ground applied: yes - Read the runtime quick reference, canonical `.agent/current` state, git status/history, reviewer record in `.agent/current/slice-history.jsonl`, and repo/test surfaces; updated `.agent/current/state.json`, `.agent/current/plan.json`, and `.agent/current/active-slice.json` to accept the reviewed slice and advance to the next implementation slice.

Acceptance criteria revalidated: yes - `daemon-registry-foundation` remains supported by repo truth: durable registry in `src/daemon/repo-registry.ts`, runtime hydration/sync in `src/daemon/server.ts`, shared runtime path exposure in `src/shared/protocol.ts`, and restart-persistence coverage in `tests/index-storage.test.ts`, with canonical verification evidence still passing at HEAD `a02764b17a4c719e538508bfb5429b02fc461d1f`.

Tracked and unignored worktree is clean: yes

Reopened slices: none

Reconciliation decision: accepted

Reconciled slice ID: daemon-registry-foundation

Current selected slice: daemon-unload-idle-and-registry-hints

Next role to invoke: completion-implementer

Exact handoff payload: {
  "schema_version": 1,
  "mission_anchor": "Fully implement the single-daemon lifecycle upgrade for pi-code-index so it uses a persistent repo registry, supports automatic idle shutdown, unloads disabled repo runtimes immediately, and exposes daemon-wide observability through doctor/status flows without introducing a new public command surface.",
  "task_type": "completion-workflow",
  "evaluation_profile": "completion-rubric-v1",
  "status": "selected",
  "slice_id": "daemon-unload-idle-and-registry-hints",
  "goal": "Use registry-backed truth to unload disabled repo runtimes immediately, perform daemon-wide idle detection with graceful auto-shutdown, and avoid unnecessary daemon wakeups by consulting registry hints first in extension startup/tool gating paths.",
  "contract_ids": [
    "LIFECYCLE-UNLOAD-IDLE-GATING"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "`/index disable` flips persistent enabled state, stops queued/background work for that repo, unloads its runtime immediately, and preserves on-disk baseline/overlay/cache data.",
    "When no repos remain enabled and there are no active requests or jobs, the daemon enters an idle grace period and then exits cleanly, removing socket and pid artifacts without launchd/systemd helpers.",
    "Extension before_agent_start and any status/tool gating path that only needs enabled/disabled hints can consult durable registry data first so disabled or never-enabled repos do not wake the daemon unnecessarily.",
    "Deterministic tests cover disable-triggered unload, idle auto-shutdown, clean restart after shutdown, and no-wakeup behavior for disabled or never-enabled repos where registry hints are sufficient."
  ],
  "priority": 2,
  "why_now": "These behaviors depend on slice 1 making persistent registration authoritative and separating loaded runtimes from registry state.",
  "blocked_on": [],
  "evidence": [],
  "locked_notes": [
    "No new daemon-management command surface.",
    "Disable must preserve cache data by default.",
    "Do not expand beyond macOS/Linux POSIX local transport assumptions."
  ],
  "must_fix_findings": [],
  "implementation_surfaces": [
    "src/daemon/main.ts",
    "src/daemon/server.ts",
    "src/daemon/repo-runtime.ts",
    "src/daemon/sqlite-store.ts or new daemon registry module",
    "src/extension/daemon-client.ts",
    "src/extension/index.ts",
    "tests/control-plane.test.ts",
    "tests/index-storage.test.ts",
    "tests/tools-parity.test.ts"
  ],
  "verification_commands": [
    "npm run check",
    "npm test"
  ],
  "basis_commit": "a02764b17a4c719e538508bfb5429b02fc461d1f",
  "remaining_contract_ids_before": [
    "LIFECYCLE-UNLOAD-IDLE-GATING",
    "LIFECYCLE-OBSERVABILITY"
  ],
  "release_blocker_count_before": 2,
  "high_value_gap_count_before": 0
}

Canonical blockers or deviations: none; canonical state had been stale on reviewer routing, but is now reconciled forward with `daemon-registry-foundation` marked done/verified and `daemon-unload-idle-and-registry-hints` selected for implementation.

goal: Use registry-backed truth to unload disabled repo runtimes immediately, perform daemon-wide idle detection with graceful auto-shutdown, and avoid unnecessary daemon wakeups by consulting registry hints first in extension startup/tool gating paths.
